name: Chicken & Black Bean Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into cubes; set aside.
2. In a skillet, cook bacon until crisp. Remove bacon to paper towels and discard the grease in the skillet.
3. Coat the skillet with non-stick cooking spray, then sauté chicken and garlic until the chicken is almost done.
4. Stir in 1/2 cup salsa, beans, red bell pepper, cumin, salt, and pepper to taste. Add green onions and reserved bacon.
5. Divide the chicken-bean mixture among 12 tortillas, placing it down the center of each tortilla. Top with 1 tablespoon shredded cheese. Roll up seam side down in a baking dish coated with spray.
6. Spoon remaining salsa evenly over enchiladas. Top with remaining cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until thoroughly heated and cheese is melted.
